alkylation reagent: alkylated (10 mM iodoacetamide, 30 min, RT, in the dark)
alkylation concentration: alkylated (10 mM iodoacetamide, 30 min, RT, in the dark)
collision energy: HCD-MS2 fragmentations were acquired with the collision energy for HCD scans set to 27% ± 5%
enrichment method: employing lectin weak affinity chromatography (LWAC) for enrichment of O-glycopeptides
instrument: connected to an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
labeling: 200 μg digest was labeled with TMT6plex
